manifesto.paragraph1: FAZO is not just an agency. We approach every project as a structured system. Every product we build is designed with clean architecture, maintainable code, refined user experience, and long-term scalability.
manifesto.paragraph2: We don't chase fast launches. We build sustainable growth. Technology is our tool. Impact is the outcome.
manifesto.paragraph3: We see design as a system, not decoration. We treat technology as potential, not just tools. The result is a product that belongs in the future.

web.title: Web Development
web.intro: Modern web platforms and administrative systems built with scalable architecture.

backend.title: Backend Systems
backend.intro: Robust backend systems powering complex business logic and integrations.

android.title: Android Apps
android.intro: High-performance mobile apps for Android — native or cross-platform.

ios.title: iOS Apps
ios.intro: Refined iOS experiences with Apple-standard design and engineering.

smm.title: SMM & Strategy
smm.intro: Strategic digital growth and brand positioning for ambitious businesses.

positioning.line2: We don't just write code — we build systems.

idea.title: Discovery
idea.desc: We analyze your business goals, define architecture, and map out a clear project roadmap. Every decision is backed by research.

design.title: Design
design.desc: We craft visual systems and user flows that balance aesthetics with function — every screen designed with intent.

development.title: Development
development.desc: Clean code. Modular structure. Security. We build with long-term maintainability as a non-negotiable requirement.

launch.title: Launch
launch.desc: Deployment, performance monitoring, and continuous support. We stay with you long after go-live.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.body: We push boundaries with modern technologies — from WebGL experiences to scalable microservices. Every project is an opportunity to craft something better.

precision.title: Engineering Precision
precision.body: We architect every solution for scale, security, and long-term maintainability. Complexity is our domain; simplicity is our output.

partnership.title: Long-term Partnership
partnership.body: We don't disappear after launch. We build lasting relationships, providing structured updates and technical clarity at every stage.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: A focused team of engineers and designers.

amir.name: Amir
amir.quote: Simplicity is the result of mastering complexity.
amir.about: Full-stack engineer specializing in scalable architectures and WebGL experiences.

bobur.name: Bobur
bobur.about: Designs robust API systems, database layers, and cloud infrastructure.

dilnoza.name: Dilnoza
dilnoza.about: Crafts refined user experiences and visual systems that communicate with clarity.

contact.trustLine: Transparent process • Structured milestones • Long-term support

cta.headline: Your idea deserves more than a template.

items.label: Architecture-first mindset
items.body: Every solution starts with a structural plan, not a template.

items.label: Long-term scalability
items.body: We build for where you're going, not just where you are.

items.label: Clean, maintainable code
items.body: Code that future developers — and your business — will thank you for.

items.label: Transparent communication
items.body: Structured updates and full technical clarity at every stage.

items.label: Strategic execution
items.body: Deadlines, milestones, and delivery without hidden surprises.
